_meta.description: Declarative active offers tagged with strategic role. Sales/Appointment/Constitution agents query these and surface the offers at multiple touchpoints.
_meta.funnel_strategy: Layer 1 (hook): 免診金 / 視診 to acquire — never lead with soup. Layer 2: classify need. Layer 3: soft 方向 product mention. Layer 4: if unsure → consult. Layer 5: post-consult → 療程 95 折.

stages.sales_pitch: Sales is actively pitching any product (soup or ointment)
stages.sales_close: Sales wrapping up — user about to order
stages.constitution_close: Constitution Agent just declared a 體質
stages.consultation_backstop: End of any product pitch — push user to consult if unsure
stages.post_consultation: User has done a consultation (online video or in-person)

offers.description_zh: 首次來診所睇症免診金（HK$200 減免）。視診同到診都可以用。
offers.positioning: 唔知自己適合飲咩？先俾中醫師睇一睇 — 第一次免診金。
offers.copy_for_writer: 首次嚟診所或者視診可以免診金（省 HK$200）

offers.description_zh: 唔方便嚟診所？可以揀網上視診，藥同湯水會直送上門，免運費。
offers.positioning: 不用出門，中醫師了解情況後，安排湯水 / 藥膏送到屋企 — 最啱 WhatsApp 客。
offers.copy_for_writer: 嚟唔到診所？可以網上視診 + 包郵送藥同湯水

offers.description_zh: 整套療程（藥膏 / 湯水 / 針灸組合）95 折優惠。
offers.positioning: 中醫師評估後需要持續調理時推 — 唔好喺 onboarding 階段推。
offers.copy_for_writer: 如果中醫師建議持續調理，買成套療程有 95 折
